title: Marion County Grant Awareness
goal: Encourage viewers to check their eligibility for the grant
hook: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.

scenes.headline: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.
scenes.voiceover: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists.

assets.description: Black woman looking worried about housing — portrait

scenes.headline: Down payment worries
scenes.body: Many believe homeownership is out of reach because they can't afford a down payment.
scenes.voiceover: Many believe homeownership is out of reach because they can't afford a down payment.

scenes.headline: A grant for minority buyers
scenes.body: There's a grant for minority first-time homebuyers in Indianapolis that covers this cost.
scenes.voiceover: But the truth is, there's a grant designed specifically for minority first-time homebuyers in Indianapolis that covers this cost.

scenes.headline: Keys to your new home
scenes.body: (example) one outcome that proves the point
scenes.voiceover: Imagine holding the keys to your new home. It’s a reality for many here in Marion County, and it could be for you too.

assets.description: Black family smiling, holding house keys outside their new home

scenes.headline: Check your eligibility
scenes.cta_text: See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes
scenes.voiceover: Speak with a HUD-approved lender to explore your options. See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes.

voiceover_script: There's a grant in Marion County that covers your down payment. Most people who qualify don't know it exists. Many believe homeownership is out of reach because they can't afford a down payment. But the truth is, there's a grant designed specifically for minority first-time homebuyers in Indianapolis that covers this cost. Imagine holding the keys to your new home. It’s a reality for many here in Marion County, and it could be for you too. Speak with a HUD-approved lender to explore your options. See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes.
thumbnail_concept: Smiling Black family holding keys outside their new home
caption: Minority homebuyers: Check if you qualify for a no-down-payment grant. It’s quick and easy!
